The POV: You and your friends have said ”Bro, let's do a hackathon" at least 17 times this semester. Well... this is your character development arc. 😭 *ArcNight '26 – Press Start to Innovate* 🏆 ₹ 2 Lakhs+ Prize Pool 👥 Team Size: 3–4 🗓️ 13–14 June 24 hours of building, caffeine, questionable sleep schedules, and potentially your biggest flex of the semester. Don't be the friend who says "I saw the poster but forgot to register." That's an NPC move. 💀 *Register:* https://microcarft-arcnight.devfolio.co/ Got doubts? We've got you: +91 73974 40445 +91 62063 05176 See you at ArcNight. Time to Microcraft yourself!

*Demystifying Competitive Programming* Organized by CodeChef VIT Chennai it is everything you need to start and grow in CP. This session is designed to help you build a strong foundation in competitive programming - from learning resources and the best practice platforms to contest strategy, upsolving, virtual contests, rating insights, and the right mindset for consistent growth. 🗓️ June 15 ⏱️ 7:00 PM – 8:00 PM 📍 Online A great opportunity for anyone looking to improve problem-solving skills and prepare better for CP, placements, and internships. Join the WhatsApp group after filling the forms to stay updated with the important details.

🌟CODECHEF VITC RECRUITMENTS 2026-27 ARE NOW LIVE! A platform to learn, create, and lead. About Us CodeChef VITC is a student-driven tech community where students learn, build, innovate, and grow through coding contests, projects, workshops, hackathons, and flagship events. Whether you're a beginner taking your first step into technology or someone looking to take your skills further, there's a place for you here. Areas of Opportunity 💻 Technical (CP) Sharpen your problem-solving skills and compete alongside passionate coders. 🌐 Projects & Web Development Build impactful projects and transform innovative ideas into reality. 🎨 Design Bring creativity to life through visuals that leave a lasting impression. 📱 Social Media & Content Create engaging content and shape the voice of CodeChef VITC. 🤝 Outreach Build valuable connections, unlock opportunities, and represent CodeChef VITC. 🎯 Event Management Plan and execute memorable events that create lasting impact. Why Join Us? ✨ Learn from a passionate community ✨ Work on exciting projects and initiatives ✨ Organize flagship events, contests, and hackathons ✨ Develop technical, creative, and professional skills ✨ Create memories, friendships, and experiences that last 🔗 Apply Here: https://codechefvitcc.vercel.app/join-us ⏳ Applications are now open — seize the opportunity to be part of something bigger. 🔥 Build. Create. Lead.

🚦 ROADYSSEY – The Campus Road Safety Challenge 🚦 ✨ The journey begins here! We are proud to present ROADYSSEY, the first event of our tenure, marking the beginning of a year filled with innovation, impact, and meaningful initiatives. Join us for an exciting online challenge where road safety meets creativity and critical thinking. Put your knowledge to the test through an interactive Mentimeter quiz and showcase your ideas in our unique Sign Challenge inspired by the iconic BRO road signs. 📅 Date: 21 June 2026 🕘 Time: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM 💻 Mode: Online Registration link: https://forms.gle/KQijwUvQGnjgtxgx8 🌟 What awaits you? 🏆 Exciting rewards 📜 Certificates for all participants 🧠 Interactive challenges 🚗 A chance to contribute ideas for safer campus roads This isn’t just an event—it’s the first step of our journey as a team, and we’d love for you to be a part of it. Navigate. Decide. Drive Safe. 🚦 Be part of the change. Let’s build a safer tomorrow, together.
